name: robot_vac_threshold_ramp
purpose: Modular one-sided threshold ramp for robot vacuums crossing a 680 mm wide, 30 mm high doorway threshold.
features: hidden underside connector keys across each seam
flat bottom for tape or friction placement
assumptions: single-sided ramp from floor up to threshold
PETG preferred; PLA acceptable for indoor proof-of-fit
segments are held together by underside keys, not brittle snap clips
final doorway fit may need tuning after measuring available floor depth
